title: Crunchy Cornmeal Crumble
description: A warm and crispy cornmeal crumble recipe perfect for a snack or side dish. Crunchy cornmeal and a hint of buttery goodness make this a delightful treat.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the cornmeal, brown sugar, and crushed crunchy topping.
Add the buttery mixture to the bowl and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with crumble topping.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
